sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_dates (id Int32, date_str String);
SELECT id, toModifiedJulianDay(date_str) AS mjd FROM test_dates;
UPDATE test_dates SET date_str = '2021-01-01' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, toModifiedJulianDay(date_str) AS mjd FROM test_dates WHERE mjd > toModifiedJulianDay('2000-01-01');
